小结.description: Session-aware daily summary workflow. Command surface: /summary -> /小结.

感悟.description: Session-aware insight capture workflow that appends dated reflections to the vault.

笔记.description: Session-aware note authoring workflow for /笔记 with confirm-before-write behavior.

breadcrumb.description: Capture durable breadcrumbs for compaction resilience, handoff, and resume without implying full /笔记 authoring.

analyze.description: Read-only deep analysis for failures, root-cause investigation, and grounded explanations.

plan.description: Strategic planning, task decomposition, and next-step sequencing.

summarize.description: Summarize URLs, local files, podcasts, and videos, including transcript extraction workflows.

trace.description: Reconstruct router, harness, command, and session breadcrumbs into a concise timeline.

code-review.description: Structured code review with severity-rated findings, file evidence, and a clear merge recommendation.

security-review.description: Structured security audit focused on auth, injection, secrets, dependency, and trust-boundary risks.

deep-interview.description: Ask one focused question at a time to reduce ambiguity before planning or execution.

keywords: which openai model should i use
openai-docs.description: Use current official OpenAI documentation for API guidance, model selection, and upgrade questions.

imagegen.description: Generate or edit raster images when the user explicitly wants image creation or bitmap asset editing.

skill.description: Manage local skills, including listing, adding, removing, searching, and editing skills.

skill-creator.description: Create or update skill contents and structure for Codex skills.

skill-installer.description: List and install curated or GitHub-hosted skills into the local Codex skills directory.

plugin-creator.description: Create and scaffold Codex plugins and optional marketplace entries.

lark-calendar.description: Feishu calendar, scheduling, attendees, free/busy, and meeting rooms.

lark-contact.description: Search users, look up profiles, and inspect organization structure in Feishu.

lark-doc.description: Create, search, read, and edit Feishu docs.

lark-drive.description: Manage Feishu cloud files, folders, permissions, imports, and downloads.

lark-im.description: Send messages, search chat history, and manage group chats in Feishu.

lark-approval.description: Manage Feishu approval instances and approval tasks.

lark-attendance.description: Query personal attendance and punch records in Feishu.

lark-task.description: Create and manage Feishu tasks and task lists.

lark-base.description: Operate Feishu Base / Bitable with schema, records, and workflow support.

lark-sheets.description: Read and write Feishu spreadsheets and cell data.

lark-mail.description: Draft, search, read, and send mail through Feishu Mail.

lark-minutes.description: Search Feishu minutes, inspect minute metadata, and download associated audio/video files.

lark-vc.description: Search completed video meeting records and fetch meeting-note, summary, todo, chapter, and transcript outputs.

lark-okr.description: View and manage Feishu OKR cycles, objectives, key results, and alignments.

lark-slides.description: Create, read, and manage Feishu slides and presentation content.

lark-whiteboard.description: Read and edit Feishu whiteboards, including Mermaid and PlantUML flows.

lark-wiki.description: Manage Feishu knowledge spaces, members, and wiki nodes.

github.description: Interact with GitHub using the gh CLI for issues, pull requests, workflow runs, and API queries.

weather.description: Get current weather and forecasts with lightweight no-key weather services.

cron.description: Schedule reminders and recurring tasks with interval, one-shot, or cron-style timing.

memory.description: Explain the two-layer memory surfaces and how to search past remembered events safely.

tmux.description: Remote-control tmux sessions when an interactive TTY or pane scraping workflow is needed.

clawhub.description: Search and install public agent skills from the ClawHub registry.

lark-event.description: Subscribe to Feishu events and consume WebSocket event streams with agent-friendly routing.

lark-openapi-explorer.description: Explore official Lark OpenAPI surfaces when existing lark-cli skills do not cover a capability.

lark-skill-maker.description: Guide creation and maintenance of custom Lark skills and adapter skill surfaces.

lark-workflow-meeting-summary.description: Aggregate meeting notes across a time range and generate a structured summary report.

lark-workflow-standup-report.description: Combine calendar agenda and task context into standup-style schedule and todo summaries.
